# Grype

<!-- Auto-generated by make generate. Do not edit manually. -->

Uses Grype vulnerability matching against the resolved dependency graph.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Matcher name | `grype` |
| Runs by default | No |
| Requires enrichment | Yes |
| Uses network | No |
| Cache behavior | Relies on Grype's local vulnerability database behavior. |
| Output fields | vulnerability ID, severity, CVSS, fixed version, references |

## User Notes

The full Bomly binary links Grype support. The lite binary uses an external `grype` executable on `PATH`.
